data.description: According to BlockBeats, OnchainLens has reported that a significant transaction involving a whale occurred, where 15.15 million ENA tokens, valued at $4.48 million, were transferred from a centralized exchange.

data.title: ZachXBT: The Hyperliquid ecosystem needs to complete compliance and analysis tools as soon as possible to avoid major incidents
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst ZachXBT posted on a social platform that the Hyperliquid ecosystem urgently needs someone to invest in building a complete data analysis and compliance tool, otherwise related projects may face major event risks. He pointed out that it is currently very difficult to track the theft of personal assets on the Hyperliquid Core or EVM chain due to the lack of available tracking and auditing tools.

data.title: Gate will launch CRT Project (CRT) spot trading and HODLer Airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate will launch CRT Project (CRT) spot trading at 14:00 (UTC+8) on June 16. The HODLer Airdrop event has been launched and will end at 10:00 (UTC+8) on June 16. Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 2,000,000 CRT. The upper limit for individual participation is 1,000 GT.

data.title: Sahara AI has raised over $23.78 million, 2.8 times more than the original amount raised
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Buidlpad official news, the fourth phase of Sahara AI community distribution "Contribution Period" has now opened, and the deadline is June 15th 22:59 (UTC+8). Eligible users can use USD1 (ERC-20/BEP-20) or equivalent BNB to participate in the contribution, with a contribution amount range of 50 to 3,000 US dollars, and the excess will be refunded after settlement. Contribution does not equal the final distribution, and the qualifications still need to be verified. The refund and settlement will be completed at 23:00 on June 18, and the final result will be displayed on the Buidlpad page.
Chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa disclosed that the platform has currently eliminated about 69,000 suspicious accounts, and only about 34,000 accounts have passed the review to participate in this round of public offering. The fundraising target for this round is 8.5 million US dollars, and about 23.78 million US dollars have been raised so far, with an over-subscription ratio of 2.8 times.

data.title: Russian police seized a vehicle-mounted crypto mining farm, and illegal power connection caused grid risks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The police in the Republic of Buryatia, Russia, recently seized a case of illegal electricity theft by a "truck"-mounted cryptocurrency mine. The mine was connected to a 10 kV transmission line without authorization. The staff discovered and reported it during a routine inspection. 95 mining machines and a transformer were seized on site, and its power supply capacity can cover a small residential area.
It is reported that this is the sixth similar case seized in the Buryat region this year. From November 15th to March 15th of the following year, any crypto mining activities except for specific areas are prohibited, and only registered companies are allowed to operate within a limited period. The energy department pointed out that illegal power connection seriously affects the quality of residents' power supply, which may lead to voltage instability, grid overload and failure risks. (TASS)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with RPL Leading Gains
data.description:
According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on June 15, with several tokens showing notable gains and losses. Among the top gainers, RPL is currently priced at $6.408, marking a 7.00% increase. UNI follows with a price of $7.357, up by 2.32%. ENJ is trading at $0.0682, reflecting a 2.08% rise, while LINK is at $13.217, up by 1.68%. MINA rounds out the top gainers with a price of $0.184, increasing by 1.65%.

Conversely, several tokens have experienced declines. HBAR is priced at $0.153, showing a decrease of 2.40%. APE is trading at $0.674, down by 1.84%. LUNC is currently at $0.0000592, reflecting a 1.41% drop. ICP is priced at $5.455, marking a 1.37% decrease, and ZK is at $0.0513, down by 1.23%.

data.title: EU Commission President Discusses Geopolitical Tensions with U.S. President Trump
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen held a productive conversation with U.S. President Donald Trump ahead of the upcoming G7 Summit. The discussion focused on the geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and the need for close coordination regarding their impact on energy markets. They also addressed the situation in Ukraine, emphasizing the necessity of a ceasefire and the importance of maintaining pressure on Russia. Additionally, they evaluated ongoing trade negotiations, with von der Leyen reaffirming a commitment to reaching a favorable agreement by July 9.

data.title: Amazon Secures Nuclear Energy Deal for Pennsylvania Data Centers
data.description:
According to PANews, Amazon has entered into an agreement with Talen Energy to utilize 1,920 megawatts (MW) of nuclear power for its web servers and artificial intelligence data centers in Pennsylvania. This agreement is set to last until 2042.

The energy will be generated at Talen's Susquehanna nuclear power plant and will supply Amazon's facilities in the region. Additionally, there are plans to explore small modular reactor (SMR) technology. Instead of direct supply from the nuclear plant, the energy will be delivered through the grid, with Amazon contributing to grid maintenance through service fees.

data.title: Bitcoin's Growing Role in Investment Portfolios, Says Coatue Management Founder
data.description: According to Odaily, Philippe Laffont, founder of Coatue Management, has observed a shift in Bitcoin's market dynamics. Initially hesitant due to its high volatility, Laffont now sees Bitcoin maturing with the involvement of institutional investors. He highlights that as Bitcoin's volatility decreases and market awareness increases, its significance in investment portfolios is expected to grow, potentially becoming a core asset.

data.title: Planet Morning News
Germany Sees Rise in Crypto-Related Money Laundering Reports
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent report from Germany's Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) reveals an 8.2% increase in money laundering reports involving cryptocurrencies last year. The total number of crypto-related reports rose from 8,049 in 2023 to 8,711, accounting for 3.3% of all suspicious activity reports submitted to the FIU, marking a record high.

Since 2020, there has been a 23.6% increase in these reports, with Bitcoin being the most frequently mentioned cryptocurrency, followed by Ethereum, XRP, Tether, and Litecoin. The FIU noted that credit institutions and banks were responsible for submitting over 6,000 crypto-related reports. These reports often involved transactions with trading platforms, mixing services, and gambling websites.

data.title: Trump held a grand military parade, and protests broke out across the United States on the same day
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News This is the largest military parade in Washington in decades. Today, dozens of tanks and war vehicles drove through the streets of the US capital to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the founding of the US Army. Nearly 7,000 soldiers will participate in the event, which is also the 79th birthday of US President Trump. Trump was welcomed at the parade and held an impromptu birthday celebration. A 21-gun salute sounded when he arrived at the scene, and the crowd began to sing "Happy Birthday to You" to Trump. At the same time, demonstrations against Trump took place across the United States. In Washington, DC, a parade marched towards the White House. The group said that 1,000 people participated in the event, some of whom held signs that read "Trump must step down immediately." In Los Angeles, police tried to disperse protesters at the "No King" demonstration with smoke or gas. (Jin Shi)
